mapper.insert: insert into credit_record ( user_id, change_type, change_score, current_score, reason, business_type, business_id, operator_id ) values ( #{userId}, #{changeType}, #{changeScore}, #{currentScore}, #{reason}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{operatorId} )
mapper.select: select id, change_type, change_score, current_score, reason, business_type, business_id, create_time from credit_record where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
select ifnull(sum(change_score), 0) from credit_record where user_id = #{userId} and change_type = 2
select count(1) from booking where user_id = #{userId} and breach_flag = 1
mapper.update: update sys_user set credit_score = #{creditScore}, update_time = now() where id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
